mapper.select: select count(*) from comments where article_id=#{articleId} and status='visible'

select c.id,c.article_id as articleId,c.user_id as userId,u.nickname,u.username,c.content,c.status,c.created_at as createdAt from comments c join users u on u.id=c.user_id where c.article_id=#{articleId} and c.status='visible' order by c.created_at desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select c.id,c.article_id as articleId,c.user_id as userId,u.nickname,u.username,c.content,c.status,c.admin_note as adminNote,c.created_at as createdAt from comments c join users u on u.id=c.user_id where c.id=#{id}

select c.id,c.article_id as articleId,a.title as articleTitle,c.user_id as userId,coalesce(u.nickname,u.username) as userNickname,c.content,c.status,c.admin_note as adminNote,c.created_at as createdAt from comments c join articles a on a.id=c.article_id join users u on u.id=c.user_id c.status=#{status} order by c.created_at desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
